case_title: LOPEZ, IRMA vs. GUEVERRA, ORLANDO et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE PRO TEM - STEVEN SCHWENK, REPORTER - SHERRY SAWYER ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED. STIP FOR JUDGMENT AND JUDGMENT - FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES AGAINST DEFT, WRIT MAY ISSUED BUT STAY UNTIL 11/15/98, ALL BACK RENT WAIVED, PARTIES BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT SOLORANZO, JILMA GUEVARA, ORLANDO ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
ROOM 220, JUDGE LITTLE, GGOROSIN, CLERK C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, ALL PARITES PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFT JILMA SOLORZANO, WHOSE JURY DEMAND STRICKEN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLOZANO, JILMA GUEVARA, ORLANDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 310 BRIDGEVIEW, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL NOV-15-1998, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
